title: ArtifactEnvelope
description: Shared protocol envelope carried by every Dev-Genie runtime artifact. Concrete artifact schemas compose this envelope with an artifact-type-specific payload schema by refining artifact_type and payload through allOf.
$comment: All listed cross-primitive fields are required. The payload field is also required so every concrete artifact has one typed body slot. Downstream schemas must not add peer top-level fields beside the envelope.

artifact_id.description: REQUIRED string. Content-addressed artifact identity in the form artifact:sha256:<64 lowercase hex characters>. The digest is computed from canonical JSON for the artifact with artifact_id omitted.

artifact_type.description: REQUIRED string. Stable artifact catalog name such as ExecutionRecord, ValidationReport, DecisionRequest, DecisionRecord, RoleInvocation, or RoleResult. Concrete schemas refine this with const.

schema_version.description: REQUIRED string. Semantic version of the artifact_type-specific payload schema. This versions payload shape only, not the shared envelope contract.

protocol_version.description: REQUIRED string. Semantic version of this shared envelope and cross-artifact compatibility contract.

created_at.description: REQUIRED string. RFC 3339 timestamp for when the producer finalized this artifact.

source_refs.description: REQUIRED array. Inputs read or depended on to produce this artifact. Each entry names an artifact, file, task, policy, command, config, URL, or external source and may include a content hash for replay/diff validation.

output_refs.description: REQUIRED array. Artifacts or external outputs produced, superseded, or materially affected by this artifact. Each entry may include a content hash so consumers can validate handoff integrity and detect drift.

ownership.description: REQUIRED object. Declared ownership surface for this artifact. DGOS-T-0015 owns and will expand the referenced subschema.

payload.description: REQUIRED object. Concrete artifact body. Downstream artifact schemas refine this property with their typed payload schema through allOf composition.

producer.description: REQUIRED object. Machine-readable producer identity for the Engine, Role, Loop, adapter, or human-originated process that emitted the artifact.

primitive.description: REQUIRED string. Runtime primitive class that produced the artifact.

version.description: OPTIONAL string. Producer implementation, prompt, or adapter version.

invocation_id.description: OPTIONAL string. Correlation id for the producer invocation that emitted this artifact.

artifactReference.description: Reference to an artifact or external source/output with optional hash metadata.

ref_type.description: REQUIRED string. Target class for the referenced input or output.

id.description: REQUIRED string. Stable id for the target. Artifact refs use artifact_id; file refs use repo-relative paths; URL refs use the canonical URL.

artifact_type.description: OPTIONAL string. Artifact catalog type when ref_type is artifact.

schema_version.description: OPTIONAL string. Referenced artifact payload schema version when ref_type is artifact.

protocol_version.description: OPTIONAL string. Referenced artifact envelope protocol version when ref_type is artifact.

uri.description: OPTIONAL string. URI or URI-reference for locating the target when the id is not sufficient.

relation.description: OPTIONAL string. Machine-readable relation between this artifact and the referenced target.

contentHash.description: Machine-readable content hash for replay, diffing, supersession, and handoff integrity checks.

value.description: REQUIRED string. Lowercase hexadecimal SHA-256 digest.

canonicalization.description: OPTIONAL string. Canonicalization method used before hashing.

confidence.description: REQUIRED object. Machine-readable confidence signal. Use score for numeric comparison and level/codes for policy routing.

score.description: REQUIRED number. Normalized confidence from 0.0 to 1.0.

level.description: REQUIRED string. Bucketed confidence for simple consumers.

reason_codes.description: OPTIONAL array. Machine-readable reason codes supporting the confidence value.

reviewRequired.description: REQUIRED object. Machine-readable human or policy review requirement.

required.description: REQUIRED boolean. True when a human or higher-level policy gate must review before the artifact is treated as complete.

reason_codes.description: REQUIRED array. Machine-readable reasons requiring review. Empty when required is false.

policy_refs.description: OPTIONAL array. Policy, config, or decision references that triggered review.

diagnostics.description: REQUIRED object. Machine-readable completion, skip, block, failure, warning, and missing-context signals.

status.description: REQUIRED string. Producer outcome for this artifact.

errors.description: REQUIRED array. Blocking or failed diagnostic codes.

missing_context.description: REQUIRED array. Context the producer needed but did not have.

path.description: OPTIONAL string. JSON Pointer or repo path associated with this diagnostic.

details.description: OPTIONAL JSON value. Structured metadata for the diagnostic; consumers must not parse prose from this field.

ref_type.description: REQUIRED string. Class of missing context.

id.description: OPTIONAL string. Stable id for the missing target when known.
